text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's almost time for curfew, but the<n>lights in the
gym are still on, so I go to<n>investigate what's
going on.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
All right. Done with the barbell. Next<n>up is fifty leg
presses.
choice_data_list: Hey, curfew's coming up pretty soon.
Hey, curfew's coming up pretty soon.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So? I'm in the zone here, so don't<n>bother me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So? I'm in the zone here, so don't<n>bother me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Shut up. Like I need telling.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Heeeey! Taishiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. Another member to add to the<n>rabble. Just
what I need.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We didn't get to play the funny-face<n>version of
rock, paper, scissors at<n>lunch, so let's hurry
back and play it<n>now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Will you stop with that?! I'm not<n>gonna play it, no
matter how much you<n>run after me and pester
me about it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! If you want me to run after you,<n>that must
mean you wanna play tag<n>instead! Okay, get
ready, 'cause I'm<n>gonna catch ya!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?! That's not what I even—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ready, set, GOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, come on!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin dashes off with<n>terrifying ferocity,
leaving Winning<n>Ticket in her dust.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Who do you think I am? I know how<n>to watch my
limits just fine!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, I notice an open notebook<n>under Narita
Taishin's training<n>equipment. It's filled with<n>
meticulously planned exercises.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Who told you you could look at<n>my
notebook?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. It's just what I have to do to<n>make sure I
win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I have to work hard to make up for all<n>the talents
and attributes I wasn't<n>blessed with.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaah! That's so moviiing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, not you again, Ticket! Why are<n>you always
bursting into tears?! It's<n>so annoying!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I came—hic!—to get you, but afterhearing your story... Waaah! You'reso amazing, Taishiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You're so cool, but I'm worried<n>you're pushing
yourself too hard!<n>Don't overdo iiiit!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, okay. I got it. There's no<n>way I can
focus like this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Look, I'll go back now, so stop<n>crying!
